title: Add Appx Package for all users
cmd: cmd /c echo "Add appx bundle package %1 for all users?"&pause&powershell.exe -Command "Start-Process cmd.exe -ArgumentList '/c', 'dism' ,'\"/Online\"', '\"/Add-AppxProvisionedPackage\"', '\"/PackagePath:%1\"', '\"/SkipLicense\"','&pause' -Verb RunAs"
name: AddAppxPackageForAllUsers
